function.description: CLF00067|Use this list to standardize country names.
function.name: CL-Countries

functionParameter.description: CLP00044|This is the type of match to be executed. Use "ENTIRE" to compare items with the entire string, "WORD" to compare items with word in the inputs, and "ANYWHERE" to find the items anywhere in the input string. If this parameter is not set, the default is "ENTIRE".
functionParameter.name: searchType

functionParameter.description: CLP00045|This flag controls whether all occurrences of the cleanse list item will be replaced in the input, or if only the first occurrence will be replaced in the input. If this parameter is not set, the default is TRUE.
functionParameter.name: replaceAllOccurrences

functionParameter.description: CLP00031|This flag controls whether the match will be stripped instead of using the replace value. If this parameter is not set, the default is FALSE.
functionParameter.name: strip

functionParameter.description: CLP00197|This flag controls whether the other cleanse items should be processed once an item has been found in the input string. If this parameter is not set, the default is TRUE.
functionParameter.name: stopOnHit

functionParameter.description: CLP00044|This is the type of match to be executed. Use "ENTIRE" to compare items with the entire string, "WORD" to compare items with word in the inputs, and "ANYWHERE" to find the items anywhere in the input string. If this parameter is not set, the default is "ENTIRE".
functionParameter.name: searchType

functionParameter.description: CLP00045|This flag controls whether all occurrences of the cleanse list item will be replaced in the input, or if only the first occurrence will be replaced in the input. If this parameter is not set, the default is TRUE.
functionParameter.name: replaceAllOccurrences

functionParameter.name: strip

functionParameter.name: stopOnHit

functionParameter.name: replaceAllOccurrences

functionParameter.name: strip

functionParameter.name: stopOnHit

function.description: CLF00008|Use this list to standarize states.
function.name: CL-States

functionParameter.name: stopOnHit

function.description: CLF00055|Street Noise, such as East or West.
function.name: CL-Street

addValidationRule.sqlWhereClause: WHERE CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE = 'PRACT' AND FIRST_NAME IS NULL
addValidationRule.name: RULE1

addValidationRule.sqlWhereClause: WHERE CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE = 'HOSP' AND HOSPITAL_NAME IS NULL;
addValidationRule.name: RULE2
